title: 论文提炼｜Scalable Transactional Stream Processing on Multicore Processors
content:
论文名称：Scalable Transactional Stream Processing on Multicore Processors
研究主题：流处理系统、共享状态与运行时调度
发表 venue：TKDE - IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering
发表年份：2025
作者：Jianjun Zhao, Yancan Mao, Zhonghao Yang, Haikun Liu, Shuhao Zhang
作者角色：你是通讯作者
一句话总结：This journal version further develops MorphStream into a more general transactional stream processing engine for multicores.
核心内容：
This journal version further develops MorphStream into a more general transactional stream processing engine for multicores. In addition to adaptive scheduling, it supports non-deterministic state access through a stateful task precedence graph and incorporates a generalized framework for window-based operations via multi-versioned state management. These extensions broaden the applicability of transactional stream processing to dynamic and irregular workloads while preserving strong semantics. Experimental results show up to 3.4× higher throughput and 69.1% lower latency than state-of-the-art alternatives.
适合回答的问题：
- 这篇论文主要解决什么问题，以及它为什么重要。
- 这篇论文的核心方法、系统设计或算法思路是什么。
- 这篇论文与 流处理系统、共享状态与运行时调度 这条研究主线的关系是什么。
